programs.title: Creflo Dollar Ministries
programs.sub_title: The Consequences of Being Out of the Will of God Pt.2 (Part1/3)
programs.desc: Hosted by Dr. Creflo and Taffi Dollar, the Changing Your World program explores the power of God in daily Christian life.

programs.title: Swallows And Amazons
programs.desc: Four children, seeking to escape the boredom of a summer holiday, vie for ownership of an island in the middle of a lake, while contending with a mysterious stranger and his boat, as they learn about survival, friendship and keeping one's nerve.

programs.title: My Favourite Martian
programs.sub_title: Blood is Thicker Than the Martian
programs.desc: Tim's cousin Harvey visits so Martin must hide. They keep Mrs. Brown away as she would speak of Martin. Harvey is a mooch and wants to upgrade from his small town reporter job to where Tim works. The tiny apartment feels cramped to Martin.

programs.title: Gideon's Way
programs.sub_title: How To Retire Without Really Working
programs.desc: Gideon goes after a criminal married couple named Robert and Margaret Gresham.

programs.title: The Derbyshire Auction House
programs.desc: Whilst sorting through an antique shop, Irita finds a Uranium glass vase. Then, she helps two brothers sell their late parent's antique collection.

programs.title: Gideon's Way
programs.desc: A man disappears after winning the football pools, leading people to assume he has left his wife - but she is convinced he has been murdered.
